meaning: n.罗马教皇职位,教皇的在位期间
examples: This system depended on two institutions, the papacy and the empire.
Throughout his papacy, John Paul has called for a second evangelization of Europe.
In many respects the council marked a pinnacle in the power and prestige of the medieval papacy.
The theories revolve around the belief that Francis doesn't have a legitimate claim to the papacy.
Elected in July at 79 and crowned in August, he resigned the papacy in December.
